From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 27 May 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-05-27
Message-ID: <Tnpq4XHET56eXMFxmVGOpg@geopod-ismtpd-16>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="ee12e1220d8ec20cdb7d1c7fc81fb6bae949d2f439338f842caa0c472dbc"

Hi there, Legendary Llama Leaders! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including our
participation in upcoming events, new features, and community
initiatives. Dive in to discover how LlamaIndex is evolving and
what we have in store for you!

🤩 The Highlights:

* Build Your 12 Factor Agents in LlamaIndex! Explore our
microsite that demonstrates how to build effective agentic
applications following the 12 principles. Check it out here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..shJe24aRS6m82XCkNuznC_-RT9zdbciAQhbqse4RzA8 ) and access the interactive
notebook here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GIvkOaBGfw_0_Db0kOk7ysUot37RLkEbIhabcJybsEc ). You can also find the
original 12 Factor Agents repo ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..AcMRUrmRKisApOF-3t_h8nuXRJT9vsFG0Y3K6v-cOGw ).

* Managing a Monorepo of 650+ Community Packages: Learn how we
built our own open-source build management tool, LlamaDev, for
faster and simpler development. Read the full story 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RRhRnYhkFP_LJHWyecVgvcDkfi2BgY0cRnIeUQvj4Yg ).

* New OpenAI Responses API Features: LlamaIndex now supports
exciting new features, including calling any remote MCP server,
using code interpreters, and generating images with
streaming. Learn more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..VdqJOWrS-UY6gD3wFCSI4EiGksoUjmi6d5PQxdAxEYM ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaParse Updates: We've made parsing documents even easier
and more efficient with a streamlined interface and new
features. Try it out and let us know what you think! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tGk24b2ZN7lrPRMhpPI6CpZ7uEDaVJhP-Z13mTzikok )

✨ Framework:

* Day 0 Support for Claude 4 Sonnet and Opus: We are excited to
announce that LlamaIndex now has day 0 support for the latest
from @AnthropicAI. Try it out here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FsV9Mt4NCJtmWduGdjqmre-w4AKrjs90XPqk5i8DYF4 ).

* Azure AI Foundry Agent Service: Now generally available with
first-class LlamaIndex support, enabling enterprise customers to
build customer support assistants and process automation
bots. Read the full announcement ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uGIPFMZBrrS_v3CjANUIR5Dq-W3OZ9cLnMqsNb8itO0 ).

✍️ Community:

* MCP Momentum: @awscloud has joined the MCP steering committee
to enhance inter-agent communication. Learn more about MCP 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YojC8tkBekGqXUD-vfo-gdb9sOu2y-QfPgbzgE1qnyA ).

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community! We look
forward to seeing you at our events and hearing your feedback on
our latest features.

Until next time, keep innovating! 🦙

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JoKEZuhAS1hvpbt-78qhnsMsLhFWyI079hEWCdpbxcI )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vQpa67YfxqVFh9ZAnHw8l9pIZthKpAaLM5HHxpknv30 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..x_c11GFiXIMV7WQaLck3cZlL6T9qCXiqgBwYdIIav24 )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
